violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Kitchen was not in use at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above bottles water in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
